boundary: This plan is a local baseline checklist. It does not run benchmarks, start cloud, promote deferred apps, or authorize RTX speedup claims.

rows.claim_limit: prepared DB sub-path only; not a DBMS or SQL-engine speedup claim
rows.claim_scope: prepared OptiX DB session behavior and Python/interface cost split
rows.comparable_metric_scope: compact_summary prepared DB query result for the same scenario/copies/iterations
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a SQL engine claim and not a broad RTX RT-core app speedup claim

rows.claim_limit: prepared DB sub-path only; not a DBMS or SQL-engine speedup claim
rows.claim_scope: prepared OptiX DB session behavior and Python/interface cost split
rows.comparable_metric_scope: compact_summary prepared DB query result for the same scenario/copies/iterations
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a SQL engine claim and not a broad RTX RT-core app speedup claim

rows.claim_limit: outlier threshold-count or DBSCAN core-count summary only; not row-returning neighbors or full DBSCAN cluster expansion
rows.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius threshold summary traversal only
rows.comparable_metric_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count/core-count result with identical radius, threshold, fixture, and copies
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, anomaly-detection-system, or whole-app RTX speedup claim

rows.claim_limit: outlier threshold-count or DBSCAN core-count summary only; not row-returning neighbors or full DBSCAN cluster expansion
rows.comparable_metric_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count/core-count result with identical radius, threshold, fixture, and copies
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a full DBSCAN clustering, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, or whole-app RTX speedup claim

rows.claim_limit: scalar pose-count collision screening only; not full robot planning, kinematics, CCD, or witness-row output
rows.claim_scope: prepared OptiX ray/triangle any-hit pose-flag summary
rows.comparable_metric_scope: prepared scalar colliding-pose count for the same poses, edges, obstacles, and iteration policy
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not continuous collision detection, full robot kinematics, or mesh-engine replacement

rows.claim_limit: prepared compact summary only; not nearest-row or whole-app speedup
rows.claim_scope: prepared OptiX fixed-radius threshold traversal for coverage-gap summaries
rows.comparable_metric_scope: prepared compact fixed-radius summary for the same generated households/events/facilities and radius
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a whole-app service coverage speedup claim and not a nearest-clinic row-output claim

rows.claim_limit: prepared compact summary only; not nearest-row or whole-app speedup
rows.claim_scope: prepared OptiX fixed-radius count traversal for hotspot summaries
rows.comparable_metric_scope: prepared compact fixed-radius summary for the same generated households/events/facilities and radius
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not a whole-app hotspot-screening speedup claim and not a neighbor-row output claim

rows.claim_limit: experimental native hit-count gate only; not pair-row any-hit or road-hazard whole-app speedup
rows.claim_scope: experimental native custom-AABB segment/polygon hit-count traversal
rows.comparable_metric_scope: strict segment/polygon hit-count result on the same dataset and output count semantics
rows.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.
rows.non_claim: not default public app behavior and not a row-returning any-hit claim
